package rulecoverage

func NegativeBufioWriterMissingInBulkExport() string {
    ruleID := "bufio_writer_missing_in_bulk_export"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "File or socket writes inside loops without visible bufio buffering."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
